title: Hex
body:
Hex adds new Enchantments to the world of Minecraft:
  • Cultivation: Tills an area around water when right-clicked
  • Yielding: Increases the amount of crops you can harvest
  • Affection: Prevents the item from reaching durability 0
  • Ying: Repairs the item up to 50% while in darkness
  • Yang: Repairs the item up to 50% while in light
  • Golden Glint: Tricks Piglins into thinking you are wearing gold armor
  • Avoiding: Upon falling into the void teleports the item to world spawn
  • Cheap Skate: Locks the base repair level of an item (the higher the level the lower the base repair cost) (added in 0.1.1)

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco

  -ShyNieke
